creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
We are working to move the default version of GCC in ports (lang/gcc)
from GCC 4.8 to GCC 4.9.

Sadly this port is one of a few that blocks this update, cf. 

http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/93amd64-default-PR196712/2015-10-26_13h36m37s/logs/errors/pl-kadu-2.1,1.log

An #include <cstdio> or similar may help.
